privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing an Instrumental Variables (IV) analysis replicating Card (1995) using the real 'card' dataset from the 'wooldridge' package. By executing the requested OLS model `lm(lwage ~ educ + exper + I(exper^2) + black + smsa + south, data=card)` via R, the coefficient for education is found to be 0.0740, slightly contradicting the metadata claim of 0.075. Running the corresponding IV model using `nearc4` as an instrument yields an education coefficient of 0.1323, verifying the metadata claim of 0.132. All expected output file paths explicitly match the scoring scripts.
